signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Please enter your credentials to sign in.

errors.google: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.github: GitHub sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox for the verification link.

signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.subtitle: Enter your details to start generating images.
signUp.emailDomainHint: Sign-up is limited to these email domains: {domains}.

verificationCode.label: Email verification code
verificationCode.sent: Verification code sent. Check your email.
verificationCode.hint: The code expires in 10 minutes and is required to finish sign-up.

errors.google: Google sign-up failed. Please try again.
errors.github: GitHub sign-up failed. Please try again.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.emailDomainNotAllowed: This email domain is not supported. Please use one of these domains: {domains}.
errors.verificationSendFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again later.
errors.invalidVerificationCode: The verification code is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email has already been registered, or was locked after account deletion. Please sign in or use another email.
errors.emailInUse: Sign-up failed: this email is already in use. Please sign in or use another email.

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.description: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Please click the link to verify your account.
verifyEmail.hint: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder.
